title: BCIStateServerAPI
description: HTTP API contract for the BCI State Server. The OpenClaw BCI plugin calls GET /state on each before_prompt_build to retrieve current brain state for context injection.

status.description: 'ok' = BCI data flowing and fresh. 'degraded' = data flowing but signal quality < 0.3 or data stale > 5s. 'no_signal' = no BCI data received yet or device disconnected.

uptime_seconds.description: How long the state server has been running.

device_connected.description: Whether a BCI device (or synthetic board) is actively streaming.

session_id.description: Current session ID, or null if no session is active.

last_update_unix_ms.description: Timestamp of the last state update, or null if no data has been received.

state_response.description: Response body for GET /state. The BCIState object wrapped with an HTTP-level status indicator.

available.description: True if BCI state data is available. False if no data has been received yet or device is disconnected.

timestamp_unix_ms.description: Server timestamp when this response was generated.

error.description: Error message when available=false, explaining why state is unavailable.

description: API endpoint definitions for the BCI State Server.

get_state.description: GET /state -- Retrieve current BCI brain state. Called by the OpenClaw BCI plugin on each before_prompt_build hook invocation.

base_url.description: Default base URL. The OpenClaw plugin config should allow overriding this.
